sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set Flex1 = Field2, Flex2 = Field3  from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on GL > = Descr and GL < = Field1 where keyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'ULAEexpReclass' and ID = 'GL'
update TransX set Flex1 = Field2, Flex2 = Field3  from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on GL > = Descr and GL < = Field1 where keyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'ULAEexpReclass' and ID = 'GL Override'
insert into TransX (KeyID,Co, GL, Flex1, Flex2, Amt1) (Select KeyID + '-data2', Co, GL, Flex1, Flex2, Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' )
update TransX set GL = Flex1 where keyID = '[batchID]'
insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, Amt1) (Select KeyID, Flex2 as GL, -Amt1 as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' )
insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, GL, TTY, Amt1) (Select KeyID, 'IF' as Ledger, GL, '' as TTY, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, GL)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY is NULL
insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, GL, TTY, Amt1) (Select KeyID, 'Z004' as Ledger, '2020000' as GL, '824' as TTY, Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '521%')
insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, GL, TTY, Amt1) (Select KeyID, Ledger, '2020000' as GL, '822' as TTY, round(-Amt1,2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '2020000')
update TransX set PK = '40', Co = '2008', Flex6 = '', Txt = 'IFRS ULAE Exp Reclass' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set PK = '50' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 < 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set Flex1 = cast(ABS(Amt1) as varchar(255)) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set PC = '',CC = '',TP = '',ProdCode = '',UWYR = '',AccYr = '',ReinName = '',ReinLoc = '',BusCat = '',Contract = '',CatCode = '',RiskTerr = '',Broker = '',PTF = '',Stat = '',TransCode = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set PC = '5200000000', ProdCode = 'UNKNOWN', UWYR = 9999, AccYr = 9999, ReinLoc = 'UNKN', BusCat = '20', RiskTerr = 'UNKN' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not GL like '6%'
update TransX set CC = '5USA000000' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '6%'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Amt1) values ('[batchID]',
